expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 为总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧面板材的厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板材的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is the total measurement, [BoardThick] is the Top, Bottom, and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is the Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุของแผ่นด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุของแผ่นด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng cộng, [BoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinukwenta ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay ang kabuuang sukat, ang [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa itaas, ibaba, at gilid na tabla, at ang [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa likod na tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: တောင့်ပုံးတစ်လုံး၏အဖွဲ့အစည်းအရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်ထောက်ပံ့မှုတိုင်း၏စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်ထိပ်ဘက်၊ အောက်ခြေနှင့်ဘက်ဖက်သတ်မှတ်မှုအတွက်အထူဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံနံရံအတွက်အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាភ្លោះទំហំសម្រាប់តុ ចាប់ពី [Width], [Height], [Depth] ជទំហំសរុប [BoardThick] ជាភ្លោះសាមញ្ញសម្រាប់ផ្នែកលើ ក្រោម និងចំហៀង និង [BackBoardThick] ជាភ្លោះសម្រាប់ផ្នែកខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຄອງເພື່ອນສຳລັບຕູ້ໂຄງ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຄວາມໃຫຍ່ລວມ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໃຫຍ່ຂອງເພື່ອນເຖິງ/ຊອກ, ແລະ [BackBoardThick] ຂອງໂຄງໃນ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのボードサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は総寸法であり、[BoardThick] は上部、下部、側板の素材の厚さで、[BackBoardThick] は背景板の素材の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재료 두께이고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y laterales, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] est la mesure totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérale, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ist die Gesamtmessung, [BoardThick] ist die Dicke des Materials für die oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Dicke des Materials für die Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड आकार गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — это толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] — это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
